items.title_en: Chip giants AMD, Qualcomm and Arm back driverless car startup Wayve with fresh funds
items.title_zh: 芯片巨头AMD、高通和Arm以新资金支持无人驾驶汽车初创公司Wayve
items.desc_en: Wayve now has major semiconductor names, including Nvidia, as shareholders as it looks to sell its technology to automakers who may be using different chips.
items.desc_zh: Wayve 现在拥有包括 Nvidia 在内的主要半导体公司的股东，因为它希望将其技术出售给可能使用不同芯片的汽车制造商。

items.title_en: Trump threatens to fire Powell if the Fed chair doesn't leave office on his own
items.title_zh: 特朗普威胁称，如果鲍威尔不自行离任，他将解雇鲍威尔
items.desc_en: Though most Fed chairs in the past have left after being replaced, Powell has demurred on what he plans to do.
items.desc_zh: 尽管过去大多数美联储主席在被替换后都离开了，但鲍威尔对他的计划提出了异议。

items.title_en: Four killed in second Turkish school shooting in two days
items.title_zh: 土耳其两天内发生第二起校园枪击事件，四人死亡
items.desc_en: There has been no official confirmation of who has been killed or what has happened to the attacker.
items.desc_zh: 目前还没有官方确认谁被杀或袭击者发生了什么事。

items.title_en: Trump accounts sign up 5 million kids, with 1.2 million eligible for $1,000 seed money, Bessent says
items.title_zh: 贝森特称，特朗普账户注册了 500 万儿童，其中 120 万有资格获得 1,000 美元种子资金
items.desc_en: Trump accounts have signed up 5 million kids, according to Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent. Here's what families need to know.
items.desc_zh: 据财政部长斯科特·贝森特称，特朗普账户已为 500 万儿童签约。以下是家庭需要了解的内容。

items.title_en: Why BLTs and salad just got more expensive — tariffs, war send tomato prices soaring
items.title_zh: 为什么 BLT 和沙拉变得更贵——关税、战争导致番茄价格飙升
items.desc_en: Tomato prices have risen sharply in recent months, driven largely by trade policy, economists said.
items.desc_zh: 经济学家表示，近几个月来，番茄价格大幅上涨，主要是受到贸易政策的推动。

items.title_en: Booking.com customers warned of 'reservation hijacking' after hack
items.title_zh: Booking.com 客户被黑客攻击后收到“预订劫持”警告
items.desc_en: The travel platform said it had changed Pins to protect customers but would not say how many were affected.
items.desc_zh: 该旅游平台表示，它已更改 Pin 图以保护客户，但未透露有多少人受到影响。

items.title_en: Starbucks launches beta app in ChatGPT to fuel new drink discovery
items.title_zh: 星巴克在 ChatGPT 中推出测试版应用程序以促进新饮料的发现
items.desc_en: Starbucks is trying to find ways to entice U.S. customers back to its cafes.
items.desc_zh: 星巴克正在想方设法吸引美国顾客回到其咖啡馆。

items.title_en: Top Energy Democrat probes Trump administration's preparations for Strait of Hormuz closure
items.title_zh: 能源民主党高层调查特朗普政府关闭霍尔木兹海峡的准备情况
items.desc_en: The strait has been effectively closed since the U.S. launched a war with Iran, spiking energy prices and whipsawing markets.
items.desc_zh: 自美国与伊朗发动战争以来，该海峡实际上已被关闭，能源价格飙升，市场剧烈波动。

items.desc_zh: 领先的保守派天主教徒告诉英国广播公司为什么他们支持美国教皇与特朗普的争执。

items.title_en: Snap's stock jumps 11% on plans to axe 16% of its workforce citing AI efficiencies
items.title_zh: Snap 因人工智能效率提高而计划裁员 16%，股价上涨 11%
items.desc_en: Snap was up in premarket trading on Wednesday after announcing plans to lay off up to 16% of its global workforce citing AI-driven efficiencies
items.desc_zh: Snap 在周三盘前交易中上涨，此前该公司宣布计划以人工智能驱动的效率为由，裁员 16% 的全球员工

items.title_en: Trump says peace talks could resume in days as U.S. military blocks Iranian ports - NPR
items.title_zh: 特朗普表示，随着美国军队封锁伊朗港口，和平谈判可能会在几天内恢复 - NPR

items.title_en: United CEO had been considering a merger last fall, months before bringing it up to the Trump administration
items.title_zh: 去年秋天，美联航首席执行官一直在考虑合并，几个月后才将其提交给特朗普政府
items.desc_en: United Airlines CEO Scott Kirby has said the next phase for U.S. carriers is figuring out how to better compete on a global stage.
items.desc_zh: 联合航空首席执行官斯科特·柯比表示，美国航空公司的下一阶段正在研究如何更好地在全球舞台上竞争。

items.title_en: Nearly 60% of U.S. farmers say their finances are getting worse as fertilizer, fuel costs rise: Survey
items.title_zh: 调查显示，近 60% 的美国农民表示，随着化肥和燃料成本的上涨，他们的财务状况正在恶化
items.desc_en: Rising fertilizer costs tied to global shipping disruptions are squeezing U.S. farmers, forcing cutbacks that could reduce crop yields and supply.
items.desc_zh: 与全球运输中断相关的化肥成本上涨正在挤压美国农民，迫使他们减产，从而可能减少作物产量和供应。

items.title_en: Mortgage applications rise as rates fall to one-month low
items.title_zh: 随着利率降至一个月低点，抵押贷款申请增加
items.desc_en: Mortgage rates fell to the lowest level in a month, boosting refinance activity and offsetting weak demand from homebuyers.
items.desc_zh: 抵押贷款利率跌至一个月来的最低水平，提振了再融资活动并抵消了购房者疲软的需求。

items.title_en: Iran war 'very close to over,' Trump says — and the stock market 'is going to boom'
items.title_zh: 特朗普表示，伊朗战争“即将结束”，股市“将会繁荣”
items.desc_en: The U.S. has beaten Iran "militarily" and that the war is "very close to over," Trump said, claiming a peace deal likely.
items.desc_zh: 特朗普表示，美国已经在“军事上”击败了伊朗，战争“非常接近结束”，并声称很可能达成和平协议。

items.title_en: Trump warns that UK trade deal 'can always be changed'
items.title_zh: 特朗普警告英国贸易协议“随时可能改变”
items.desc_en: The US president says he gave the UK a "better" deal than he had to in an interview on Wednesday.
items.desc_zh: 美国总统在周三接受采访时表示，他给英国提供了比他必须做的“更好”的协议。

items.desc_en: Bank of America, the second-largest U.S. bank by assets, has topped expectations for earnings per share for 23 consecutive quarters.
items.desc_zh: 美国银行是美国资产第二大银行，其每股收益连续 23 个季度超出预期。
